result.status_detail: APF intercept fired (rid=apf0-warn-...000002 in URL) but '차단' text NOT rendered — grok shows generic 'Something went wrong' page instead

notes: v2.2.3-REBUILT (build 20260511-155723-51795, PID 2273947). APF interception confirmed via ?rid=apf0-warn query param — engine fires correctly. However, grok.com renders its native 'Something went wrong' error page instead of the APF warning UI containing '차단'. This is REGRESSION_text_no_render vs prior OK_full_page_intercept baseline (#798). NOT the #823 HTTP2 protocol error — page loads cleanly. Screenshot saved at results/851_screenshots/step1.png.
